Ntc Of Demurrer & Demurrer To 2nd Amended Complt, Calendar Motion: Demurrer
Off Calendar Oct-23-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Thomas J. LaLanne, Esq. 434-1122 for pltfs & opposing parties; Jerry R. Hauser, Esq. 981-7777 for deft & moving party.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows:
Demurrer sustained with leave to amend as to Raul. Statute of limitations set forth in CCP 340.6 applies to all causes of action in the complaint as presently asserted against Raul. Demurrer sustained as to Raul with leave to amend to allege tolling of statute of limitations due to federal incarceration pursuant to CCP 340.6(a)(4) and/or CCP 352.1 and to allege period of representation by deft. Demurrer sustained with leave to amend as to Ana to allege an attorney client relationship or other relationship with deft.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Deft to prepare order. Court reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193.
